mapper.select: SELECT uc.id, uc.sku_id, p.title as product_title, s.specification, s.price, uc.quantity, (s.price * uc.quantity) as total_price, pi.url as image_url, (s.stock > 0) as in_stock, p.id as product_id FROM user_cart uc LEFT JOIN sku s ON uc.sku_id = s.id LEFT JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON p.id = pi.product_id AND pi.image_type = 0 WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uc.updated_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND sku_id = #{skuId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM user_cart WHERE id IN
#{id}

SELECT uc.id, uc.sku_id, p.title as product_title, s.specification, s.price, uc.quantity, (s.price * uc.quantity) as total_price, pi.url as image_url, (s.stock > 0) as in_stock, p.id as product_id FROM user_cart uc LEFT JOIN sku s ON uc.sku_id = s.id LEFT JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON p.id = pi.product_id AND pi.image_type = 0 WHERE uc.id IN
#{id}
